Identity.Name: StingRibaStages
Identity.Definition: RIBA Plan of Work 2020 stages — the eight workstages 0..7 that structure UK project delivery. Drives stage-aware IDS overlays (sting-stage{N}-*.ids), stage-gate workflows, and the RIBA stage cards in Planscape mobile / web. The stage code is the IDS applicability key for "what must be true at this gate".

Value.Definition: Stage 0 — Strategic Definition. Client needs / business case; no design content yet.
Stage 1 — Preparation and Briefing. Project brief, feasibility, site information.
Stage 2 — Concept Design. Initial massing, spatial concept, key strategies.
Stage 3 — Spatial Coordination. Coordinated spatial layout, system zoning, scope-box discipline.
Stage 4 — Technical Design. All technical information at LOD/LOI required for construction.
Stage 5 — Manufacturing and Construction. Build phase; fabrication packs; site instructions.
Stage 6 — Handover. As-built models, COBie, O&M manuals, training, sign-off.
Stage 7 — Use. In-use phase; AIM maintained; sensor data / maintenance feedback loops.
